requirement_topic.en: Malaysia Grid Connection — 240 V / 50 Hz and ST Project Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 马来西亚并网接入——240 V / 50 Hz及ST项目审批
requirement_topic.zht: 馬來西亞併網接入——240 V / 50 Hz及ST項目審批

summary.en: Malaysia operates on 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz, distributed by Tenaga Nasional Berhad (TNB) in Peninsular Malaysia and Sabah Electricity Sdn Bhd (SESB) / Sarawak Energy in East Malaysia. Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) — the Energy Commission of Malaysia — regulates electrical installations and EV charging infrastructure under the Electricity Supply Act 1990 and the Electrical Installation Act 1994. EV charging equipment and infrastructure installations require ST type approval and installation approval by a registered wireman or electrical engineer. Grid-connected EV chargers must comply with TNB supply connection requirements, including meter provisioning, load application, and supply capacity assessment. Harmonic limits and power-quality obligations are governed by MS IEC 61000 series standards and TNB distribution supply rules. Public fast DC chargers in Malaysia are typically rated at 50 kW to 180 kW and AC chargers at 7.4 kW to 22 kW.
summary.zh: 马来西亚采用240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz电网，由马来西亚国家能源公司（TNB）在马来半岛供电，沙巴电力有限公司（SESB）/砂拉越能源在东马供电。马来西亚能源委员会（ST）依据《1990年电力供应法》和《1994年电气安装法》监管电气安装和电动汽车充电基础设施。电动汽车充电设备和基础设施安装须取得ST型式批准，并由注册电工或电气工程师进行安装审批。并网充电桩须符合TNB供电接入要求，包括电表配置、用电申请和供电容量评估。谐波限值和电能质量义务依据MS IEC 61000系列标准和TNB配电供电规则执行。马来西亚公共直流快充额定功率通常为50 kW至180 kW，交流充电桩为7.4 kW至22 kW。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞採用240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz電網，由馬來西亞國家能源公司（TNB）在馬來半島供電，沙巴電力有限公司（SESB）/砂拉越能源在東馬供電。馬來西亞能源委員會（ST）依據《1990年電力供應法》和《1994年電氣安裝法》監管電氣安裝和電動汽車充電基礎設施。電動汽車充電設備和基礎設施安裝須取得ST型式批准，並由注冊電工或電氣工程師進行安裝審批。併網充電樁須符合TNB供電接入要求，包括電表配置、用電申請和供電容量評估。諧波限值和電能質量義務依據MS IEC 61000系列標準和TNB配電供電規則執行。馬來西亞公共直流快充額定功率通常為50 kW至180 kW，交流充電樁為7.4 kW至22 kW。

standards_or_laws: Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) — EV Charging Equipment and Installation Guidelines
TNB Supply Connection Requirements — Peninsular Malaysia
MS IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
MS IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system general requirements (Malaysian adopted standard)

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Malaysia's 240 V / 415 V supply requires confirmation of input-voltage range and component derating, while the tropical high-humidity climate (Malaysia annual average temperature 27–33 °C, relative humidity regularly above 80%) imposes different environmental derating requirements compared to China's temperate inland design baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。马来西亚240 V / 415 V供电要求确认输入电压范围和部件降额；热带高湿气候（马来西亚年均气温27至33°C，相对湿度常超80%）对环境降额要求与中国温带内陆设计基线不同。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。馬來西亞240 V / 415 V供電要求確認輸入電壓範圍和部件降額；熱帶高濕氣候（馬來西亞年均氣溫27至33°C，相對濕度常超80%）對環境降額要求與中國溫帶內陸設計基線不同。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range and rated voltage of the charger covers 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) power electronics and thermal design are derated for Malaysia's tropical climate (sustained high temperature and humidity — ambient up to 40 °C and relative humidity up to 95%); (3) TNB supply connection application, meter provisioning, and load-application documentation are prepared; (4) installation by a ST-registered wireman or qualified electrical engineer; (5) single-line diagram, load calculations, metering data, and commissioning records prepared for ST and TNB approval. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without input-range and humidity-derating confirmation is not grid-ready for Malaysia without additional engineering review.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围和额定电压覆盖240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 电力电子和热设计针对马来西亚热带气候（持续高温高湿——环境温度最高40°C，相对湿度最高95%）进行了降额；(3) 准备TNB供电接入申请、电表配置和用电申请文件；(4) 由ST注册电工或合格电气工程师安装；(5) 准备单线图、负荷计算、计量数据和调试记录以供ST和TNB审批。未确认输入范围和湿度降额的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计，在未经额外工程审查的情况下不满足马来西亚并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍和額定電壓覆蓋240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 電力電子和熱設計針對馬來西亞熱帶氣候（持續高溫高濕——環境溫度最高40°C，相對濕度最高95%）進行了降額；(3) 準備TNB供電接入申請、電表配置和用電申請文件；(4) 由ST注冊電工或合格電氣工程師安裝；(5) 準備單線圖、負荷計算、計量數據和調試記錄以供ST和TNB審批。未確認輸入範圍和濕度降額的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計，在未經額外工程審查的情況下不滿足馬來西亞併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ST regulates all EV charging equipment and installations in Malaysia; ST type approval (CoA) and installation approval by a registered wireman or electrical engineer are required; TNB supply connection approval is required for grid-connected chargers
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ST or TNB approval substitute; voltage, humidity, and thermal ratings must be re-confirmed for Malaysia conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Malaysia-ready charger package needs IEC-based product evidence, ST Certificate of Approval (CoA), grid-voltage and tropical climate derating confirmation, TNB supply-connection documentation, and installation by an ST-registered wireman or electrical engineer. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without input-range and humidity confirmation is not Malaysia grid-ready.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向马来西亚的充电桩资料包须包括IEC体系产品证据、ST设备批准证书（CoA）、电网电压和热带气候降额确认、TNB供电接入文件，以及由ST注册电工或电气工程师进行安装。未确认输入范围和湿度的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计不满足马来西亚并网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向馬來西亞的充電樁資料包須包括IEC體系產品證據、ST設備批准證書（CoA）、電網電壓和熱帶氣候降額確認、TNB供電接入文件，以及由ST注冊電工或電氣工程師進行安裝。未確認輸入範圍和濕度的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計不滿足馬來西亞併網要求。
